case_title: SHALITA WILLIAMS VS. SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0 ) SERVED JUN-14-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,587.33 FILED BY WILLIAMS, SHALITA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2011 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, NO EXHIBITS DETAIN BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE PRO TEM. BETSY JOHNSEN, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (PARTIES STIPULATED FOR JUDGE PRO TEM. IN OPEN COURT)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-10-2011 AT 10:00AM. CASE IS DISMISSED AGAINST ALL OTHER DEFENDANTS (INCLUDING DENNIS HERRERA AND BRIAN CAULEY) WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (SERVICE FEE $0.00) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, SHALITA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, SHALITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT $1,087.33 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,087.33, CASE IS DISMISSED AGAINST ALL OTHER DEFENDANTS (INCLUDING DENNIS HERRERA AND BRIAN CAULEY) WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2014
